title: Anchor Calendar Requirements
summary: Product requirements for Anchor's calendar features: Google Calendar connection, event retrieval, morning check-ins, calendar additions, reminders, and disconnect.
notes: Path is docs/requirements/ and content is structured as numbered requirements (CAL-001 to CAL-010) each with explicit acceptance criteria in user/product language ('A User must be able to...', 'Anchor must...'). No API schemas or endpoint contracts, so SPEC was ruled out. High confidence: path convention plus matching content signals both indicate PRD.
